title: What's in Store for Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) in Q1 Earnings?
text: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) first-quarter 2023 performance is likely to have benefited from strength in the Asset Intelligence and Tracking segment despite foreign currency headwinds.

title: Zebra Technologies to Release First Quarter Results on May 2
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a leading digital solution provider enabling businesses to intelligently connect data, assets, and people, will report its first quarter 2023 financial results on Tues. morning, May 2, 2023. The company will also host a conference call to discuss these results on the same day at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET).

title: Zebra Technologies to Celebrate Youth Engagement in STEM at FIRST® Championship
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a leading digital solution provider enabling businesses to intelligently connect data, assets, and people, today announced its sponsorship of the 2023 FIRST® Championship taking place April 19-22, 2023 at the George R. Brown Convention Center in Houston, Texas.

title: Stocks For This OPEX Week: Buy Zebra Technologies
text: This coming week is options expiration week in April which has a bullish bias.

title: Nasdaq Bear Market: 2 Excellent Stocks to Buy at a Discount
text: Spending on warehouse automation and productivity solutions is slowing in 2023, but it's likely to be temporary. Cognex's sales are always lumpy, and there's no reason investors shouldn't expect a bounce-back in 2024.

title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Chosen for SEG's Store Upgrade
text: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) is set to offer its retail execution software portfolio for improving SEG's workflow execution, communications and visibility into task completion across all stores.
